# Evergreen Wealth Track

> Calm, India-first personal finance web app: expense tracking in INR with multi-currency support, budgeting, SIP and compound-interest calculators, subscription planning, and honest curated finance reading.

Evergreen Wealth Track helps individuals and households in India track money, plan budgets, and grow savings without dark patterns or noise. INR-first with multi-currency conversion, bank-grade row-level security, and no re-selling of user data.

## Pages
- [Home](/): What Evergreen is and who it's for.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): A walkthrough of the tracking, budgeting, and calculator flows.
- [Blog](/blog): Curated personal finance reading — SIPs, compounding, UPI, and mindful money.
- [Security](/security): The controls that protect user data — RLS, HTTPS, headers, and audit posture.

## Optional
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign-in / sign-up entry point.

## Contact
- Product feedback and support: via the in-app chat widget on any page.
